name: Amazon Visa

welcome_offer.description: $50 Amazon Gift Card instantly on approval (no Prime membership required)

earning_rates.category: Amazon.com, Amazon Fresh, Whole Foods Market

earning_rates.notes: 3% cash back on travel purchased through Chase Travel
2% cash back on local transit and commuting (including rideshare)
1% cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Travel Protections
other_benefits.description: Travel Accident Insurance ($500K), Lost Luggage Reimbursement ($3,000), Baggage Delay Insurance ($100/day x 3 days), Auto Rental Coverage (secondary), Roadside Assistance, Travel & Emergency Assistance

other_benefits.name: Purchase Protections
other_benefits.description: Purchase Protection (120 days, $500/item), Extended Warranty (adds 1 year)

notes: No Prime membership required (unlike Prime Visa). Lower earning rates than Prime Visa but no Prime subscription needed. Good option for non-Prime Amazon shoppers who want Amazon rewards without paying $139/year for Prime.
